zh.Stonor, Henley, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II是Richard de Stonor I的兒子，於大約1220年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯頓。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1273年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stonor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stoner
meanings: English (Sussex): topographic name from Middle English ston(e) ‘stone’ + -er, used for someone who lived by a prominent rock or stone, or perhaps who came from a place called Stone, although this formation is more rare. See Stone and compare Stoneman .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Steiner  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II was born about 1220, in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard de Stonor I. He had at least 1 son. He died about 1273, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II est né environ 1220, à Stonor, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard de Stonor I. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1273, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II wurde um 1220 in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richard de Stonor I geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1273 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II è nato il circa 1220 nel Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard de Stonor I. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1273, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Stonor, Henley, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノー
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor IIは約1220年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノーでRichard de Stonor Iの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1273年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II(은)는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토너에서 Richard de Stonor I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1273년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard de Stonor I. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1273, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Stonor II родился около 1220 г. в местности стонор, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Richard de Stonor I. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1273 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.
